name: @0xkobold/pi-skills
description: Dynamic Skill Creator Extension for pi agent
readme:
# pi-skills

A [pi](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono) package that provides tools for creating and managing skills.

## Installation

```bash
pi install npm:@0xkobold/pi-skills
```

Or try without installing:
```bash
pi -e npm:@0xkobold/pi-skills
```

## Features

Provides 5 tools for dynamic skill management:

| Tool | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `create_skill` | Create new skill directories with SKILL.md |
| `update_skill` | Modify existing skills, add scripts/references/assets |
| `package_skill` | Package skills into `.skill` files for distribution |
| `list_skills` | List all installed skills |
| `get_skill_content` | Read a skill's SKILL.md |

## Usage

```typescript
// Create a new skill
await create_skill({
  name: "pdf-processor",
  description: "Extract text and images from PDF files."
});

// Update an existing skill
await update_skill({
  name: "pdf-processor",
  addScript: "scripts/extract_text.py"
});

// Package for distribution
await package_skill({
  name: "pdf-processor",
  outputPath: "./dist"
});

// List all skills
await list_skills();

// Read a skill's content
await get_skill_content({ name: "pdf-processor" });
```

## Structure

```
pi-skills/
├── extensions/
│   └── index.ts      # Main extension
├── skills/           # Package skills (if any)
├── benchmark/        # Tests
└── package.json
```

## Extension Stats

- **Size**: 8.7 KB
- **Tools**: 5 registered
- **Validation**: ✅ Passed
